mistral-ai.summary: Mistral Small 4 is a powerful hybrid model capable of acting as both a general instruction model and a reasoning model. papers.summary: Large vision-language models can produce object hallucinations in image descriptions, highlighting the need for effective detection and mitigation strategies. Prior work commonly relies on the model's attention weights on visual tokens as a detection signal. Epist
papers.summary_zh: 本文在一個代理系統的背景下提出了 epistemic blinding，該系統使用大型語言模型對多個生物數據集進行推理以確定藥物靶點的優先順序。在開發過程中，我們發現 LLM 輸出會默默地將數據驅動的 inference 與關於命名實體的 memorized priors 混合在一起——而且這種混合是不可見的：無法從單一輸出判斷有多少來自頁面上的數據，又有多少來自模型的訓練記憶。Epistemic blinding 旨在解決這一問題，提供一種在 inference-time 審計這種污染的方法。

radar.summary_zh: 知識庫 (KBs) 在各種應用中扮演關鍵角色。作為兩個代表性的知識庫相關任務，知識庫補全 (KBC) 和知識庫問答 (KBQA) 彼此緊密相關且本質上互補。因此，解決聯合 KBC 和 KBQA 任務以使其相互增強將會非常有益。然而，現有研究通常依賴小型語言模型 (SLM) 來共同增強它們，而大型語言模型 (LLM) 強大的推理能力
radar.title: Joint Knowledge Base Completion and Question Answering by Combining Large Language Models and Small Language Models
radar.title_zh: 透過結合大型語言模型與小型語言模型實現聯合知識庫補全與問答

links.title: CLEAR: Cross-Lingual Enhancement in Alignment via Reverse-training

primary_link.title: CLEAR: Cross-Lingual Enhancement in Alignment via Reverse-training

radar.summary: Existing multilingual embedding models often encounter challenges in cross-lingual scenarios due to imbalanced linguistic resources and less consideration of cross-lingual alignment during training. radar.summary_zh: 現有的多語言嵌入模型在跨語言情境中常面臨挑戰，原因在於語言資源不平衡以及訓練期間對跨語言對齊的考量不足。儘管用於跨語言適應的標準化對比學習方法已被廣泛採用，但它們可能難以捕捉語言之間的基本對齊，並會降低在英語等對齊良好語言中的性能。為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了 Cross-Lingual Enhancem
radar.title: CLEAR: Cross-Lingual Enhancement in Alignment via Reverse-training
radar.title_zh: CLEAR: 透過反向訓練實現跨語言對齊增強

links.title: WikiSeeker: Rethinking the Role of Vision-Language Models in Knowledge-Based Visual Question Answering

primary_link.title: WikiSeeker: Rethinking the Role of Vision-Language Models in Knowledge-Based Visual Question Answering

radar.summary: Multi-modal Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has emerged as a highly effective paradigm for Knowledge-Based Visual Question Answering (KB-VQA). radar.summary_zh: 多模態檢索增強生成 (RAG) 已成為基於知識的視覺問答 (KB-VQA) 的一種高效範式。儘管近期有所進展，主流方法仍主要依賴圖像作為檢索關鍵，並常忽視或錯置視覺語言模型 (VLMs) 的作用，從而未能充分發揮其潛力。本文介紹了 WikiSeeker，一種新穎的多模態
radar.title: WikiSeeker: Rethinking the Role of Vision-Language Models in Knowledge-Based Visual Question Answering
radar.title_zh: WikiSeeker: 重新思考視覺語言模型在基於知識的視覺問答中的作用

links.title: Generative Retrieval Overcomes Limitations of Dense Retrieval but Struggles with Identifier Ambiguity

primary_link.title: Generative Retrieval Overcomes Limitations of Dense Retrieval but Struggles with Identifier Ambiguity

radar.summary: While dense retrieval models, which embed queries and documents into a shared low-dimensional space, have gained widespread popu- larity, they were shown to exhibit important theoretical limitations and considerably lag behind traditional sparse retrieval models in certain settings. radar.summary_zh: 儘管將查詢和文件嵌入共享低維空間的 Dense Retrieval 模型已獲得廣泛普及，但它們在某些設定下顯示出重要的理論局限性，並且顯著落後於傳統的 Sparse Retrieval 模型。Generative Retrieval 作為 Dense Retrieval 的一種替代方法應運而生，它使用一個 language model 直接預測查詢與文件的相關性。本論文中，我們展示了 Generative Retrieval 的優勢和劣勢。
radar.title: Generative Retrieval Overcomes Limitations of Dense Retrieval but Struggles with Identifier Ambiguity
radar.title_zh: Generative Retrieval 克服了 Dense Retrieval 的局限性，但難以處理識別符模糊性

radar.summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models based on flow matching -- such as pi0, pi0.5, and SmolVLA -- achieve state-of-the-art generalist robotic manipulation, yet their iterative denoising, typically 10 ODE steps, introduces substantial latency: on a modern GPU, denoising alone accounts for 80% of end-to-end inference time. radar.summary_zh: 基於 flow matching 的 Vision-Language-Action (VLA) 模型，例如 pi0、pi0.5 和 SmolVLA，實現了最先進的通用機器人操控。然而，它們的迭代去噪過程（通常需要 10 個 ODE 步驟）會引入大量的延遲：在現代 GPU 上，僅去噪就佔據了端到端推理時間的 80%。天真地減少步驟數是不可靠的，由於速度場未針對單步跳躍進行校準，這會降低大多數任務的成功率。我們提出了 SnapFlow，這是一個隨插即用。
radar.title: SnapFlow: One-Step Action Generation for Flow-Matching VLAs via Progressive Self-Distillation
radar.title_zh: SnapFlow：透過漸進式自我蒸餾實現 Flow-Matching VLA 的單步動作生成

radar.summary_zh: 透過自然語言查詢來理解動態 4D 環境，不僅需要精確的場景重建，還需要跨空間、時間和視角的穩健語義基礎。儘管最近使用 neural representations 的方法已經推進了 4D 重建，但它們在上下文推理方面仍然有限，特別是對於複雜的語義，例如互動、時間動作和空間關係。一個關鍵挑戰在於將嘈雜、依賴視角的預測轉化為全局。
radar.title: PanopticQuery: Unified Query-Time Reasoning for 4D Scenes
radar.title_zh: PanopticQuery：適用於 4D 場景的統一查詢時推理

links.title: Efficient Inference for Large Vision-Language Models: Bottlenecks, Techniques, and Prospects

primary_link.title: Towards Trustworthy Report Generation: A Deep Research Agent with Progressive Confidence Estimation and Calibration

top5.summary: As agent-based systems continue to evolve, deep research agents are capable of automatically generating research-style reports across diverse domains. While these agents promise to streamline information synthesis and knowledge exploration, existing evaluation frameworks-typically based on subjective dimensions-fail to capture a critical aspect of report quality: trustworthiness. In open-ended research scenarios where ground-truth answers are unavailable, current evaluation methods cannot effect
top5.summary_zh: 隨著 agent-based systems 持續發展，deep research agents 能夠自動生成跨多個領域的研究風格報告。儘管這些 agents 有望簡化資訊整合與知識探索，但現有的評估框架（通常基於主觀維度）未能捕捉報告品質的一個關鍵面向：trustworthiness。在 ground-truth 答案不可用的開放式研究情境中，目前的評估方法無法有效
top5.title: Towards Trustworthy Report Generation: A Deep Research Agent with Progressive Confidence Estimation and Calibration
top5.title_zh: 邁向可信賴的報告生成：一種具備漸進式置信度估計與校準的深度研究代理

links.title: Short Data, Long Context: Distilling Positional Knowledge in Transformers

primary_link.title: Short Data, Long Context: Distilling Positional Knowledge in Transformers

top5.summary: Extending the context window of language models typically requires expensive long-context pre-training, posing significant challenges for both training efficiency and data collection. In this paper, we present evidence that long-context retrieval capabilities can be transferred to student models through logit-based knowledge distillation, even when training exclusively on packed short-context samples within a long-context window. We provide comprehensive insights through the lens of Rotary Posit
top5.summary_zh: 擴展語言模型的 context window 通常需要昂貴的 long-context pre-training，這對訓練效率和數據收集都帶來了重大挑戰。在本文中，我們提出了證據，表明即使僅在 long-context window 內使用打包的 short-context samples 進行訓練，long-context retrieval capabilities 也可以透過 logit-based knowledge distillation 轉移到 student models。我們透過 Rotary Posit 的視角提供了全面的見解
top5.title: Short Data, Long Context: Distilling Positional Knowledge in Transformers
top5.title_zh: 短數據，長上下文：在 Transformers 中蒸餾位置知識

links.title: Attention Editing: A Versatile Framework for Cross-Architecture Attention Conversion

primary_link.title: Attention Editing: A Versatile Framework for Cross-Architecture Attention Conversion

top5.summary: Key-Value (KV) cache memory and bandwidth increasingly dominate large language model inference cost in long-context and long-generation regimes. Architectures such as multi-head latent attention (MLA) and hybrid sliding-window attention (SWA) can alleviate this bound, but integrating them into existing models remains difficult. Prior methods impose fine-grained structural requirements on both source and target attention modules, which cannot meet the feasible requirement in practical deployment.
top5.summary_zh: 在 long-context 和 long-generation 模式下，Key-Value (KV) cache 記憶體和頻寬越來越成為大型語言模型 inference 成本的主導因素。諸如 multi-head latent attention (MLA) 和 hybrid sliding-window attention (SWA) 等架構可以緩解此限制，但將它們整合到現有模型中仍然困難重重。先前的方法對 source 和 target attention modules 都施加了細粒度的結構要求，這無法滿足實際部署中的可行性要求。
top5.title: Attention Editing: A Versatile Framework for Cross-Architecture Attention Conversion
top5.title_zh: 注意力編輯：一個用於跨架構注意力轉換的多功能框架

links.title: Target Policy Optimization

primary_link.title: Target Policy Optimization

top5.summary: In RL, given a prompt, we sample a group of completions from a model and score them. Two questions follow: which completions should gain probability mass, and how should the parameters move to realize that change? Standard policy-gradient methods answer both at once, so the update can overshoot or undershoot depending on the learning rate, clipping, and other optimizer choices. top5.title: Target Policy Optimization
